name: Shandong Sunway Chemical Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Sunway Petrochemical Engineering Co.,Ltd engages in the design, consulting, and EPC contracting in petrochemical/coal chemical industry in China. Its projects include AGO unit/VGO units, catalytic cracking units, FCC, hydrogenation units, and sulfur recovery units. The company also offers building engineering services; engineering consulting services; and design services for pressure vessels and pressure pipelines. Shandong Sunway Petrochemical Engineering Co.,Ltd was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Zibo, China.
